title: protium divaricatum subsp. divaricatum
intro: Protium divaricatum subsp. divaricatum, also known as the divaricating protium or the divaricatum protium, is a subspecies of plant belonging to the Protium genus, which is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains lignans and other bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Protium divaricatum subsp. divaricatum include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against diseases such as cancer, diabetes, and cardiovascular disease. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional medicine as a decoction, to harness its medicinal benefits.
